entries.title: Lovable signs multiyear deal with Google Cloud to up usage 5x, source says
entries.description: Lovable and Google signed an expanded multiyear deal that involves a 5x expansion of Lovable's footprint on Google Cloud, and expanded access to Anthropic Claude.

entries.title: Alphabet’s record-breaking $85B raise for Google’s AI business is a helluva good signal
entries.description: If Alphabet's record-breaking $85 billion stock sale signals investor appetite for AI-related offerings, we can see that investors are ready to chow.

entries.title: Google’s Dreambeans, its weirdest-named AI tool to date, will turn your life into a cartoon
entries.description: Dreambeans is a curated list of AI-illustrated "stories" culled from the personal data in your Google account.

entries.title: Amazon will show AI product images when you search for some reason
entries.description: Amazon will use visual search and AI to show AI-generated product images that match your search queries. The retailer says it will help guide users to products.

entries.title: These two founders left Goldman and Meta to build voice AI for markets everyone else overlooked
entries.description: The startup's own stack for Africa and Middle East is now handling more than 17,000 calls per day.

entries.title: Publishers will be able to opt out of AI Search, thanks to new regulation
entries.description: U.K. regulators are requiring Google offer a tool allowing website publishers to opt-out of generative AI search features. The option will be tested in the U.K. then rolled out globally.

entries.title: Meta’s AI agent for WhatsApp Business is now available globally
entries.description: WhatsApp will charge businesses for using its AI agent based on token usage.

entries.title: Coralogix raises $200M on bet that someone needs to watch the AI agents
entries.description: Coralogix is among a growing number of infrastructure firms betting that as AI systems move into production, demand will rise for tools that can monitor their behavior, troubleshoot failures, and prov

entries.title: Cyera eyes $12B valuation at 80x ARR multiple despite operating losses
entries.description: The cybersecurity company is nearing a $300 million round led by Evolution Equity Partners.

entries.title: Uber caps employee AI spending after blowing through budget in 4 months
entries.description: Uber's cutback has occurred after the company had reportedly encouraged staff to use AI as much as possible.

entries.title: New Microsoft tool lets devs spin up AI behavior tests using text descriptions
entries.description: Microsoft on Tuesday took the wraps off Adaptive Spec-driven Scoring for Evaluation and Regression Testing, an open source framework for spinning up AI evaluations.

entries.title: Martin Scorsese becomes the latest — and most unlikely — Hollywood voice for AI
entries.description: The caveat is that one of the world's most famous living directors is using the tech solely for storyboarding.

entries.title: Microsoft launches Scout, an OpenClaw-inspired personal assistant
entries.description: Launched at Build, Microsoft Scout is a new AI assistant meant to bring the power and flexibility of OpenClaw into the Microsoft 365 system.

entries.title: Google rolls out fake call detection to protect against AI deepfake impersonation scams
entries.description: As people increasingly refuse to answer calls from unknown numbers, scammers are shifting their tactics by spoofing trusted phone numbers and using AI deepfake technology to sound like authority figur

entries.title: Microsoft offers devs a better way to control AI agent behavior
entries.description: The specification lets developer, compliance, and security teams define their own policies for agents to follow in portable policy files.

entries.title: Amazon faces class action lawsuit over Ring facial-recognition feature
entries.description: The class action lawsuit, filed in Seattle by Virginia resident Charles Sigwalt, claims that Ring's Familiar Faces feature stores images of passersby without consent.

entries.title: Trump signs narrower executive order on AI oversight after industry objections
entries.description: After industry objections, President Trump signed a revised AI executive order requiring only voluntary prerelease government reviews of advanced models.

entries.title: OpenAI launches new Codex tools for white-collar work
entries.description: OpenAI released a set of six plug-ins aimed at specific jobs: data analytics, creative production, sales, product design, equity investing, and investment banking. Available from within the Codex app,

entries.title: ZeroDrift raises $10M to protect AI models from themselves
entries.description: A new AI compliance service sits between AI models and end users to flag and replace any messages that might present a compliance problem.

news.description: If Alphabet's record-breaking $85 billion stock sale signals investor appetite for AI-related offerings, we can see that investors are ready to chow.
